hypotheses.changed_logic: Use a longer RS lookback before tilt scoring.
hypotheses.expected_failure_mode: Too slow to react after semiconductor leadership shifts.
hypotheses.expected_improvement: Reduce signal lag/noise from short relative-strength reversals.
hypotheses.kill_criteria: Reject if return/drawdown remains negative versus B0 or turnover/cost worsens without compensating benchmark-relative benefit.
hypotheses.mini_window_validation_method: Rerun development/diagnostic windows only; compare B3 vs B0 and B4 after redesign.
